news.title:
TCS to announce Q4FY26 results on April 9, followed by Infosys, HCL Tech, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra. Brokerages favor HCL Tech and Tech Mahindra.
Nifty IT index down 23% YTD amid AI disruption fears; Motilal Oswal sees FY27 guidance, demand outlook, and deal wins as key investor focus.
news.summary:
TCS to announce Q4FY26 results on April 9, followed by Infosys, HCL Tech, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra. Brokerages favor HCL Tech and Tech Mahindra.
Nifty IT index down 23% YTD amid AI disruption fears; Motilal Oswal sees FY27 guidance, demand outlook, and deal wins as key investor focus.

news.title:
Indian IT stocks, including Infosys and HCLTech, fell 1-2% due to profit booking and softer demand signals.
Morgan Stanley cites deceleration in BFSI and Retail IT spending; AI-led disruption adds pressure on valuation multiples.

news.title:
HCLTech to announce Q4 results on April 21; profit may decline QoQ.
Brokerages forecast 3-5% FY27 IT services growth, margins aided by rupee depreciation.
news.summary:
HCLTech to announce Q4 results on April 21; profit may decline QoQ.

news.title:
HDFC Securities projects muted Q4 growth for tier 1 IT firms; mid-tier firms may outperform.
Infosys, HCLTech preferred by HDFC; AI-centric opportunities may offset 6-7% deflation impact.
news.summary:

news.title:
Indian IT firms, including TCS, Infosys, and HCLTech, face subdued Q4 with ~10% YoY growth driven by weak rupee.
Wars, weak discretionary spending, and AI concerns strain client budgets, making next fiscal's revenue key for investors.
news.summary:
Indian IT firms, including TCS, Infosys, and HCLTech, face subdued Q4 with ~10% YoY growth driven by weak rupee.
Wars, weak discretionary spending, and AI concerns strain client budgets, making next fiscal's revenue key for investors.

news.title:
IT stocks like HCL Tech, Coforge, and Persistent Systems rose 1-2% despite market sell-off.
Nifty IT gained 0.3% with 8 constituents up, while Sensex/Nifty fell over 1.4%.

The platform enhances workflows with Responsible AI for governance, security, and measurable ROI.

news.title:
HCL Tech aims 3x growth in IBM software portfolio and 2-4% revenue rise in FY26.
The company is also restructuring parts of its operations for this target.
news.summary:
HCL Tech aims 3x growth in IBM software portfolio and 2-4% revenue rise in FY26.
The company is also restructuring parts of its operations for this target.

news.title:
HCLTech restructures its software arm, HCLSoftware, into three sub-groups: Xperience, Data, and Operations, aiming for growth in the AI era.
The company acquired Jaspersoft and Wobby for $245.3M and plans to triple software business growth by FY27.
news.summary:
HCLTech restructures its software arm, HCLSoftware, into three sub-groups: Xperience, Data, and Operations, aiming for growth in the AI era.
The company acquired Jaspersoft and Wobby for $245.3M and plans to triple software business growth by FY27.

news.title:

HCLTech's FY27 revenue growth forecast at 2.5-5.5%; forex gains to aid profitability.
news.summary:

news.title:
